news.headline: FWDX launches Measles Primer Set; 222 cases reported in 12 states. FWDX Primer Set is compatible with qPCR and digital PCR platforms.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on March 13, 2025, it was reported that over 222 cases of measles have been identified in 12 states, as per the CDC. The FWDX Measles Primer Set mentioned in the news is designed to work with qPCR and digital PCR systems, ensuring accurate detection of the measles virus.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals reports record revenue, adjusted net earnings, and operating cash flow in 2024. A diversified portfolio drove success.
news.summary: In the latest financial report released on March 13, 2025, Wheaton from Vancouver, BC announced impressive results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company saw record-breaking figures with revenue reaching an all-time high, along with adjusted net earnings and operating cash flow. These outstanding results were attributed to Wheaton's diverse range of top-tier and enduring assets. The specific numbers were not disclosed.

news.headline: Mattr Corp. announced its Q4 and full year 2024 results; Financials for December 31, 2024 are available on their website.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Mattr Corp. (TSX: MATR) released its operational and financial performance for the three and twelve months concluding on December 31, 2024. Interested individuals are advised to review the Management Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) and audited consolidated financial statements for the years ending on December 31, 2024, and 2023, accessible on the Company’s website and www.sedarplus.com.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals increases quarterly dividend to US$0.165 per share, a 6.5% rise from last quarter.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on March 13, 2025, Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.165 per common share for 2025. This marks a significant 6.5% rise from the previous quarter.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. completes private placement financing, issuing 7,000,000 units for $700,000 ($0.10 per unit).
news.summary: In Toronto on March 13, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE:IDK / OTCQX:IDKFF), a venture capital firm based in Canada specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, successfully completed its private placement financing. The company issued a total of 7,000,000 units at $0.10 per unit, resulting in gross proceeds of $700,000.

news.headline: Arcos Dorados (NYSE: ARCO) to join investor events in London on March 18-19, 2025, including BTG Latam Opportunities Conference.
news.summary: Montevideo, Uruguay - The Latin America's biggest restaurant chain and the top independent franchisee of McDonald's globally, Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO), revealed its involvement in upcoming investor gatherings. The company is set to attend the BTG Latam Opportunities Conference 2025, taking place in London on March 18 and 19, 2025. Arcos Dorados will be actively engaging in the event on both days. Additionally, they will also participate in the Morgan Stanley 17th Annual Latin conference.

news.headline: Haivision reports Q1 results ended January 31, 2025, as a top video networking and collaboration solutions provider.
news.summary: Montreal-based Haivision Systems Inc. (TSX: HAI) has revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending January 31, 2025. As a prominent provider of real-time video networking and visual collaboration solutions, Haivision reported strong numbers for this period. The company showcased its position as a global leader in delivering mission critical services.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp appoints CEO Rod West to board and intends to appoint Gavin Molinelli from Starboard Value LP.
news.summary: In Oakville, Ontario, Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (TSX/NYSE: AQN) revealed that CEO Rod West has been appointed to the Board of Directors. In addition, the Board plans to add Gavin Molinelli, Senior Partner and Portfolio Manager at Starboard Value LP, as a Board member pending approval by the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission. The new appointment of Mr. Molinelli comes as part of a strategic move by AQN to enhance its Board.

news.headline: Toyota Tsusho America, Radius deal expected to close in 2 hours
Gaming activity surges in February on L2 blockchains, with over 20,000% growth, but daily unique wallets decline by 16%. Blockchain gaming investments rise to $55 million, up 243% from January.
news.summary: Gaming activity on certain layer-2 blockchains surged by over 20,000% in February 2025, with Abstract leading the growth. Soneium and Linea followed with growth rates of over 3,200% and 1,000% respectively. Two key games driving the growth were Treasure Ship on Abstract and Evermoon on Soneium. However, despite the rise in gaming activity, daily unique active wallets (dUAWs) dropped by 16% compared to January, settling at 5.8 million. DeFi now dominates, overshadowing blockchain gaming due to market uncertainty. Blockchain gaming investments hit $55 million in February, a 243% increase from January. Year-over-year, blockchain gaming activity surged by 386%, reaching 7 million dUAWs. Challenges persist in the sector, with critics expressing concern over sustainability of growth and lack of new capital influx.

news.headline: OpenText raises share buyback program to US$450M, adding US$150M, aims to buy back stock for cancellation.
news.summary: Waterloo-based tech company OpenText™ disclosed on March 13, 2025, that it has boosted its Fiscal 2025 normal course issuer bid (NCIB) by $150 million. This extension allows the company, listed on NASDAQ as OTEX and on TSX as OTEX, to buy back shares for cancellation worth a total of a maximum of...

news.headline: Ulta Beauty's Q4 revenue reaches $3.49 billion, beating estimates. Earnings per share reported at $8.46, surpassing $7.14.
news.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc (NASDAQ:ULTA) disclosed its fourth quarter financial results after Thursday's market close. The company's Q4 revenue stood at $3.49 billion, surpassing the anticipated $3.46 billion. Earnings for the quarter were reported at $8.46 per share, exceeding analyst predictions of $7.14 per share. Total revenue experienced a 1.9% decline year-over-year in Q4, while comparable sales rose by 1.5% year-over-year. This growth was primarily attributed to a 3% surge in average ticket sales, offsetting a 1.4% reduction in transactions. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SIR Royalty Income Fund reports $62.3 million revenue in Q4 2024, down from $64.7 million in Q4 2023. 2024 results show $255.0 million revenue.
news.summary: The SIR Royalty Income Fund reported its financial results for Q4 2024 and the year ended December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, Pooled Revenue was $62.3 million, Royalty income was $3.7 million, and net earnings were $2.2 million, with a 1.5% decline in same-store sales. Distributable cash totaled $2.2 million, resulting in a 109.0% payout ratio. For the year 2024, Pooled Revenue was $255.0 million, Royalty income was $15.3 million, and net earnings were $12.0 million. Distributable cash totaled $9.5 million, leading to a 100.2% payout ratio. SIR Corp experienced a cybersecurity incident in September 2024, impacting revenue, and entered into a Twelfth Amendment to its Credit Agreement in December 2024. The Fund continues to focus on innovation and enhancing its brand portfolio, with new restaurant openings and closures in 2024. As of January 1, 2025, the Royalty Pool consists of 52 restaurants.

news.headline: Toyota Tsusho America to acquire Radius Recycling for 30 per share
Algonquin appoints Rod West, Starboard Gavin Molinelli to board
Yasuhiro Hayami invests in Mother Labs at JPY9 billion valuation in March 2025, about $60 million USD. Executive shows commitment to growth.
news.summary: In Tokyo on March 13, 2025, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) shared news of the latest investment by Yasuhiro Hayami, the Chief Business Officer of MEDIROM Mother Labs Inc., a subsidiary of the Company. Hayami made a second investment in Mother Labs' Series A financing, valuing the company at JPY9 billion before the round (approximately US$60 million as of March 13, 2025). This recent investment comes after Hayami's initial participation in the Series A financing back in December 2024. Hayami, a dedicated senior executive at Mother Labs, aligns with MEDIROM's corporate principles, vision, and commitment to future growth prospects.

news.headline: Integra LifeSciences executives to present at Oppenheimer Healthcare Conference on March 17, 2025 at 10:00am ET. (NASDAQ: IART)
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Integra LifeSciences Holdings Corporation revealed that its CEO, Mojdeh Poul, and CFO, Lea Knight, will be speaking at the 35th Annual Oppenheimer Healthcare MedTech & Services Conference on March 17, 2025, at 10:00am ET. The company, a prominent global medical technology firm trading as NASDAQ: IART, shared this news.

news.headline: Toyota Tsusho Corporation's U.S. subsidiary to buy Radius Recycling, boosting future growth with acquisition.
news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This positive trend has led to an increase of 250,000 new jobs being created in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market experienced a boost, with the main index jumping by 3.5% to reach a record high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this economic growth to successful government policies and increased consumer spending. Overall, the outlook for the country's economy appears optimistic as it continues to recover from the impact of the recent global crisis.

news.headline: GURU Organic Energy Corp. elects nominees as directors at annual meeting of shareholders. TSX: GURU.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, GURU Organic Energy Corp. (TSX: GURU), the top organic energy drink brand in Canada, revealed that the candidates outlined in its January 29, 2025 management information circular were voted in as directors of the Company during the recent annual shareholders meeting. The specific outcomes of the election were as follows:

news.headline: Wallbridge reports 2024 drilling results on Detour East Property near Fenelon Gold Project; Agnico holds option.
news.summary: In an update dated March 13, 2025, Wallbridge Mining Company Limited shared that it obtained the final assay results from the exploration drilling program conducted by Agnico Eagle Mines in 2024 on the Detour East property. Situated about 55 kilometers west of Wallbridge's Fenelon Gold Project and 25 kilometers east of Agnico's Detour Lake gold mine, Agnico has the opportunity to acquire a 75% interest in the Detour East Property, presently wholly owned by Wallbridge. Wallbridge's stock is listed as TSX: WM and OTCQB: WLBMF.

news.headline: Iridex (NASDAQ: IRIX) to announce Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on March 27, 2025, after market close.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Iridex Corporation, a prominent provider of laser-based medical systems for treating glaucoma and retinal diseases, disclosed intentions to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year of 2024, along with a business update. The details are expected to be made public after the market closes on Thursday, March 27, 2025. Iridex Corporation, known for its innovative and adaptable approach, operates under the ticker symbol IRIX on the NASDAQ exchange.

news.headline: USDA cuts $1 billion in food program funding, impacting schools and food banks. Marvell Foods steps up with discounted solutions to help.
news.summary: The recent decision by the USDA to reduce funding by more than $1 billion for food programs aiding schools and food banks has resulted in the elimination of crucial support for millions of individuals. In response to these budget cuts, Marvell Foods, a prominent player in the secondary food industry, is providing discounted, premium food options to assist the affected organizations.

news.headline: NFI reports $12.8 billion in record backlog, strong Q4 and Fiscal 2024 results with improved net earnings and Adjusted EBITDA.
news.summary: The company reported a historic backlog of $12.8 billion, marking a substantial increase in net earnings and adjusted EBITDA compared to the previous year.

A 44-acre Campos Family Vineyards in California, including a baseball field, to be auctioned by Elite Auctions on April 7.
news.summary: An upcoming auction by Elite Auctions is offering a prime opportunity for wine enthusiasts to acquire the Campos Family Vineyards, a 44-acre property located in Byron, California. Scheduled for April 7, this auction presents a dream scenario for those interested in owning a vineyard in this picturesque location.

news.headline: Cash App's subsidiary granted FDIC approval for Borrow Loans. A significant achievement for the company.
Subaru of America ranked #1 for dealership service satisfaction in 2025 U.S. Customer Service Index Study.
news.summary: A leading automaker based in Camden, New Jersey, has been crowned the top performer in customer satisfaction for dealership service in the 2025 U.S. Customer Service Index (CSI) Study. Subaru of America, Inc. and its network of retailers clinched the coveted number one spot for Mass Market Brands. This recognition underscores their commitment to providing exceptional customer service.

news.headline: HUD pauses energy-efficient upgrades program in affordable housing to review its implementation.
news.summary: The Department of Housing and Urban Development has announced a review of the Biden-era program to guarantee its alignment with the agency's fundamental objectives.

news.headline: High Wire Networks boosts cybersecurity renewal, ARR, and partner success through bundling strategy.
news.summary: High Wire has successfully secured a significant renewal deal for Overwatch, leading to a noteworthy increase in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) and enhancing partner success. This was achieved through the implementation of bundling, scalability, and pipeline fractionalization strategies. The renewal deal is set to bring in a substantial amount of revenue, showcasing the effectiveness of these approaches in driving growth and profitability for the company.

news.headline: WM Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAPS) announces strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. CEO Doug Francis praises the team's effort.
news.summary: WM Technology, Inc., based in Irvine, California, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and the year ended December 31, 2024. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol MAPS, is a prominent provider of marketplace and technology solutions for the cannabis sector. CEO Doug Francis commended the team for achieving robust financial outcomes. The specifics of the results include detailed figures for revenue, profit, and other financial metrics, showcasing the company's operational efficiency and performance throughout the year.

news.headline: Charge Enterprises appoints Spencer Bolgard as CEO, bringing experience to electrical, broadband, and EV sectors.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Charge Enterprises, a prominent company specializing in electrical, broadband, and electric vehicle charging infrastructure, revealed the selection of Spencer Bolgard as its CEO. Bolgard, with extensive experience, is set to lead the company towards further success. This development marks a significant step for the company as it aims to strengthen its position in the market.

news.headline: Pivot Bio introduces PROVEN G3, a third-generation nitrogen product with new modes of action and gene-editing technology. Available to US growers.
news.summary: Pivot Bio, a prominent agtech company, is leading the biologicals industry with its advanced third-generation nitrogen product line. The company revealed that this new product will soon be accessible to growers in the United States. Based in St. Louis, the announcement was made on March 13, 2025. Pivot Bio continues to revolutionize the industry with this new offering, showcasing their commitment to innovation and sustainability.

news.headline: Semtech's Q4 earnings of 40 cents/share beat consensus by 25%, revenue at $251M exceeded estimates. Shares soar afterwards.
news.summary: Semtech Corp. (SMTC) announced its Q4 results, surpassing expectations. The company reported earnings of 40 cents per share, a 25% increase over the estimated 32 cents. Revenue for the quarter was $251 million, exceeding the projected $249.19 million and showing growth from $192.94 million a year earlier. The Q4 report by Semtech revealed strong performance, with non-GAAP figures indicating impressive results. The news is now available for further reading on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Foods Holding stock's IBD Composite Rating rose from 94 to 96, indicating improvement in its rating.
news.summary: US Foods Holding witnessed a rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating on Thursday, climbing from 94 to 96. This uptick reflects positive performance and potential for the company's stock.

news.headline: Pinterest stock's SmartSelect Composite Rating increased from 88 to 96 on Thursday, as reported on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: On Thursday, Pinterest experienced a rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating from 88 to 96. This uptick showcases positive momentum in the company's stock performance. The increase to a rating of 96 indicates a notable improvement according to Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Rubrik stock rises on positive Q4 results, revenue outlook for fiscal 2026. Narrowed loss, exceeded expectations.
news.summary: Rubrik's stock experienced a significant increase following the data security software company's announcement of a Q4 loss that was smaller than anticipated and revenue that exceeded expectations. The firm's stock saw a rise after reporting a positive outlook for fiscal year 2026 revenue. The company's performance was well-received by investors, reflecting confidence in its financial results.

news.headline: Tim Draper predicts Bitcoin to reach $250,000 by end of 2025, citing it as the future dominant currency.
news.summary: Renowned venture capitalist Tim Draper, famous for his Bitcoin price forecasts, has reiterated his prediction of Bitcoin hitting $250,000 in a recent interview. Draper accurately predicted in 2014 that Bitcoin would reach $10,000 within three years, which it did. However, Bitcoin has yet to reach his current $250,000 target, with its highest value to date being approximately $109,000 in January. Draper reaffirmed his $250,000 prediction during an interview on "The Raz Report" podcast with Benzinga founder Jason Raznick, stating it will happen by the year's end. This prediction highlights Draper's bullish outlook on the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Eimskip's AGM 2025 agenda and proposals released, includes Board's recommendations and Nomination Committee report.
news.summary: The agenda and proposals for the 2025 Annual General Meeting have been finalized by the Board of Directors. Additionally, the Company's Nomination Committee has submitted its report. Please review the enclosed documents for further details and information regarding the meeting.

news.headline: WinVest Acquisition Corp. prolongs the Termination Date to April 17, 2025, to complete a business combination.
news.summary: In Cambridge, MA, on March 13, 2025, WinVest Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: WINV) disclosed an extension approved by its Board of Directors to finalize an initial business combination. The extension granted adds one month to the original deadline, now set for April 17, 2025, following the guidelines of the Company’s Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This move is intended to offer more time for WinVest Acquisition Corp. to successfully execute an initial business combination.

news.headline: Bladex & Scotiabank lead US$100M loan for EGE Haina to support renewable energy projects, following GLP guidelines.
news.summary: The syndicated loan, adhering to the Green Loan Principles (GLP) set by the Loan Market Association (LMA) and the Loan Syndications and Trading Association (LSTA), showcases a joint effort to back projects fostering the shift to renewable energy. This commitment highlights a dedication to environmentally-friendly initiatives.

news.headline: MSA Safety CFO Lee McChesney resigns; Elyse Brody appointed interim CFO. Resignation effective March 21, 2025.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, MSA Safety Inc. (NYSE: MSA) revealed the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Lee B. McChesney, effective March 21, 2025. McChesney, appointed CFO in October 2022, has decided to depart for a comparable role elsewhere.

news.headline: Progressive Planet's Q3: $422K EBITDA, down from $732K last year. $4.8M cash on hand as of Jan 31, 2025. Got $1.56M grant.
news.summary: Progressive Planet Solutions Inc. announced its financial results for Q3 ending on January 31, 2025, reporting its highest cash on hand ever at $4,819,839, with a $1.56 million grant funding for a pilot plant. The company was profitable, growing its cash position from operational cash flow. However, gross margin was impacted by one-time expenses like higher costs and a write-down on a receivable from a bankrupt Canadian chain. The cash balance increased by $1,867,662 in this quarter compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Rubrik stock rises post strong Q4 results. Losses of 61 cents/share beat estimates. Revenue hits $258.1M, above $233.1M estimate. Subscription Annual Recurring Revenue grows 39% year-over-year to $1,092.6M.
news.summary: Rubrik Inc. (NYSE:RBRK) has disclosed its Q4 financial results, revealing notable figures for the quarter. Their earnings were reported at a loss of 61 cents per share, surpassing analyst predictions of an 80-cent loss. The quarter's revenue stood at $258.1 million, also exceeding the analyst consensus of $233.1 million. In terms of performance during Q4, the company saw a 39% year-over-year increase in Subscription Annual Recurring Revenue, reaching $1,092.6 million by January 31, 2025. This data showcases significant growth and potential for Rubrik. For further details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sleep Number partners with largest shareholder Stadium Capital; 5 Board members to retire. #business #partnership
news.summary: In Minneapolis today, Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) revealed its recent agreement with Stadium Capital Management, LLC, its largest shareholder. This agreement entails the retirement of five current members of the Sleep Number Board of Directors. The retirement of these members, in addition to other recent updates, has been outlined as part of the aforementioned Agreement. Stay tuned for more updates on this developing situation.

news.headline: Senators question Pfizer's Direct-To-Consumer model, sent letter to UpScriptHealth CEO. Introduced PfizerForAll in August 2024.
news.summary: In August 2024, Pfizer Inc (NYSE:PFE) launched the PfizerForAll digital platform in partnership with UpScriptHealth, Alto Pharmacy, and Instacart. In a letter to UpScriptHealth CEO Peter Ax, four senators - Richard Durbin, Elizabeth Warren, Peter Welch, and Bernie Sanders - expressed concerns about the financial ties between Pfizer and UpScriptHealth regarding possible violations of the federal Anti-Kickback Statute (AKS). The senators questioned the PfizerForAll program's funding by Pfizer and its potential impact on steering patients towards specific drugs. This story is available on Benzinga.com and was updated to include the senators asking UpScriptHealth to respond.

news.headline: Veritone appoints Francisco J. Morales to Board of Directors effective 3/20/2025. Morales is Co-founder of 5.11 Tactical. Founded in 2003, 5.11 Tactical is a global market leader in tactical apparel for law enforcement, military, and first responders.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc., a leading provider of human-centered enterprise AI solutions traded on NASDAQ under VERI, has recently revealed the addition of Francisco J. Morales to its Board of Directors. This appointment will officially take effect on March 20, 2025. Morales, the Co-founder and Executive Chairman of 5.11 Tactical, which he established in 2003, joins the board bringing his extensive experience as the former CEO of the renowned company. 5.11 Tactical is a global industry frontrunner in producing tactical apparel, footwear, and gear tailored for law enforcement, military personnel, and first responders.

news.headline: Trump requests Supreme Court to step in on Birthright Citizenship issue.
